name: Valterra Resource Corporation
summary: Valterra Resource Corporation, an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of natural resource properties. The company primarily explores for copper, gold, and porphyry deposits. It holds 100% interests in the Swift Katie copper gold porphyry property consisting of 19 contiguous MTO mineral claims covering approximately 83 square kilometers located near Salmo, British Columbia; and the Los Reyes property consisting of 2 claims totaling 45 hectares located to south of the city of Jimenez, Mexico. The company also has an option to acquire a 100% interest in the Livramento Gold Project and Lima Gold Project located in Brazil. The company was formerly known as Valterra Wines Ltd. and changed its name to Valterra Resource Corporation to reflect its entry into the mineral resource sector in April 2005. Valterra Resource Corporation was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
